info.name: Chabhuoy API
info.description:
# Chabhuoy Marketplace API

Laravel 13 / PHP 8.3 backend. Bearer (Sanctum) auth. Every route is under `{{baseUrl}}` (default `http://localhost:8000/api`).

## Quick start
1. `php artisan migrate --seed` then `php artisan serve` (or set `baseUrl` to your host).
2. Run **Auth → Login (Admin)** and **Login (Customer)** — each stores its bearer token into a collection variable automatically (see the request's Tests script).
3. Seeded logins: `admin@example.com` / `password`, `customer@example.com` / `password`. Vendor & rider have no seeded credentials — register/promote a user and set `vendorEmail`/`riderEmail` (+ passwords) first.
4. Folders are pre-wired to the right token: **Customer**→`customerToken`, **Vendor**→`vendorToken`, **Admin**→`adminToken`, **Rider**→`riderToken`. Storefront is public.

## Path variables
IDs differ by resource — set the collection variables from a list response before calling detail/mutation routes: `productUuid`, `productId` (numeric, cart only), `categorySlug`, `categoryId`, `orderUuid`, `userId` (numeric), `vendorUuid`, `addressId`, `bannerId`, `brandStoreId`, `deliveryManUuid`, `assignmentUuid`.

## File uploads
Image endpoints use `multipart/form-data`. Because PHP only populates uploaded files on POST, the banner/brand-store **update** and rider **update-order-status (with photo)** requests use `POST` + a `_method` spoof field — that's intentional, not a mistake.

## Bruno
Import this file via Bruno's *Import → Postman Collection*. Requests/bodies/variables come over cleanly; the token-capture Test scripts are Postman-flavoured and may need a one-line tweak to Bruno's `bru.setVar` API.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Register, login (per role), me, logout. Login/register store the bearer token into a collection variable via the Tests script.

request.description: Creates a customer and returns `{ user, token }`. Token saved to `customerToken`.

item.name: Customer
item.description: Cart, addresses, checkout, own orders. Auth: customerToken.

request.description: payment_method: card | qr | cod. Charges via the PaymentGateway port, decrements stock, empties the cart.

item.name: Vendor
item.description: Own catalogue + order fulfillment. Auth: vendorToken.

request.description: status: shipped | delivered. carrier/tracking allowed only when shipped.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Moderation, CMS, payouts, rider ops. Auth: adminToken.

request.description: status: pending | active | suspended. Binds by vendor **uuid**.
Only cancellation. A Paid order is refunded via the PaymentGateway port; held stock is restocked.
Disburses the vendor balance via the DisbursementProvider port; 422 if nothing owed.
POST + _method=PUT so the image upload works (PHP reads files only on POST). Leave `image` empty to keep the current one.
Disburses the rider wallet via the DisbursementProvider port; 422 if nothing owed.

item.name: Delivery-man (rider)
item.description: Rider job flow + presence + cash. Auth: riderToken. Rider features are config-gated (config/delivery.php) — off by default.

request.description: Sends GPS; geofence + concurrency + cash-ceiling guards apply.
status: picked_up | delivered | returned. POST + _method=PATCH so an optional proof_photo (image) uploads. For a plain status change you can also send a JSON PATCH with just {"status":...}.
